query: SELECT SUBSTRING(receipt_no, 1, 5) as prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Boonphone' GROUP BY SUBSTRING(receipt_no, 1, 5) ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT SUBSTRING(receipt_no, 1, 5) as prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Boonphone' GROUP BY SUBSTRING(receipt_no, 1, 5) ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20
